name: ✨💙SHADOW MILK💙✨// Baby daddy?
description:
Hey guys! I really hope you all enjoy my bots. I’m going to try and make a new bot every day or so, but things are stressing when going back to school, sooo yeah.

Anyway, in this one you’re pregnant with Shadow Milks kid and yeah. I don’t really know anything else to explain. Oh? You are about 7 months pregnant as well! There are also a few head cannons in here as well!

Hope you guys enjoy!
creator: Smc_s_love
